_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: Nf2 mice harbor loss of Nf2 in SCs and their precursors. These mice develop spontaneous, cranial nerve V (CN V), CN VIII, and paraspinal schwannomas within the DRG that are histologically consistent with human disease
details: Develop spontaneous cranial nerve V, CN VIII, and paraspinal schwannomas within DRG that are histologically consistent with human disease
